human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for accommodation-and-travel front-office boundary discipline, arrival and reservation mismatch handling, prerequisite validation, payment guarantee and room-readiness gating, safety and fraud escalation, functionality coverage, research contract coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and retail-consumer-and-hospitality research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for intake-access-and-initiation plus retail-consumer-and-hospitality are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to front-office intake, including arrival verification, reservation and itinerary readiness, payment guarantee, room status, identity signals, and owner routing without rate, refund, compensation, fraud, safety, or room-control authority drift.

Authority sources cover public front-desk workflow duties, ADA lodging reservation handling, short-term-lodging fee disclosure, aviation refund and merchant-of-record handling, billing-error boundaries, identity-theft controls, public-health accommodation handling, and PCI-aware payment-data handling with refresh and decay rules.

Scenario set covers missing prerequisites, arrival and reservation mismatch, room and payment readiness blockers, VIP exception pressure, refund and policy exceptions, adjacent routing, fraud and safety stop conditions, high-volume arrivals, conflicting policy, and tenant adaptation.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdictional lodging, property, brand, supplier, processor, and tenant differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
